creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
Created attachment 143490
Update to port

STAGEify.  Update MASTER_SITE.  pkg-message-ify.  Use USERS/GROUPS (note second patch to UIDs/GIDs) instead of interactive hand-rolled script.  Enable GNU_STRFTIME, which really means "has %z" which we do.  Update WWW.  Change a few dirrm's in the plist to dirrmtry's, since runtime data can wind up in a few places.
